title: Integrated Intermediate Modeling Capstone · Independent Model Trial
summary: Build a decision model from messy requirements, data, constraints, and alternatives. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a stakeholder-ready computational modeling portfolio with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Decompose an unfamiliar decision into linked algebraic, statistical, and computational submodels.
Compare multiple plausible models with validation evidence and complexity costs.
Propagate uncertainty through best, expected, and adverse scenarios.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
